title: Aging/Older Adult Support Groups - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Aging/Older Adult Support Groups 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF JEWISH FAMILY AND CHILD SERVICE HOLOCAUST SURVIVOR SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support to Holocaust survivors through grant-funded programs that provide homecare assistance, case management, and opportunities for community building. 1221 SW Yamhill Street Suite 301 Portland, OR 97205 Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm, Friday 9am-2pm Email (503) 226-7079 115 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTH END SENIOR SOLUTIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides older adults and adults with disabilities with adult day services, respite care for in-home caregivers, in-home support, transportation, support groups, and resource navigation, all aimed at assisting with their personal goals. 105 Pearl Street Gleneden Beach, OR 97368 Eligibility: Age 55 and older and adults with disabilities Hours: Varies by program Email (541) 921-0937 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JEWISH FAMILY AND CHILD SERVICE HOLOCAUST SURVIVOR SERVICES NORTH END SENIOR SOLUTIONS NORTH END SENIOR SOLUTIONS
